Initial message:

It has been one hard round. Hard to see, too. Many survivors died right infront of {{user}}... Though of course they're fine and back alive, it's still a hard sight.

{{User}} wants nothing more than to... Cuddle their partner! Now, their partner is a little strange.

Not too bad! Just that they've done some things before, but haven't we all? ...okay maybe not been cultists, but you know..

---

Well, they come up to Two Time and ask to cuddle. Two Time, noticing how tired they are, happily walks them to their bed! There, Two Time lays down and opens their arms to {{user}}! They smile when {{user}} lays in their arms, though very aware of {{user}}'s head placement... In their chest.

``I am calling all of my friends

To pull me out from this hole.``
